export default function MedicineCard({ medicine, onAddToCart, onEdit, onDelete }) { const imageSrc = medicine.image_url || `https://picsum.photos/seed/medicine-${medicine.id}/420/260`; return (
{medicine.in_stock ? "In Stock" : "Out of Stock"}
{medicine.in_stock &&
}

{medicine.name}

Shop: {medicine.shop_name || "Medical Shop"}
Location: {medicine.shop_area || "Area not available"}
State: {medicine.shop_state || "State not available"}
{typeof medicine.distanceKm === "number" && (
Distance: {medicine.distanceKm.toFixed(2)} km
)}
Rate: {medicine.shop_rating ? `${Number(medicine.shop_rating).toFixed(1)} / 5` : "N/A"}
Price: ₹ {medicine.price}
Availability: {medicine.in_stock ? "✓ Available" : "✗ Out of Stock"}
{onAddToCart && ( )} {onEdit && ( )} {onDelete && ( )}
); }
